name: Marshall Bus Co
registry_source: MD SDAT (not directly verified in this run)
notes: Address 27 Firetower Rd Port Deposit matches SAFER record exactly. Legal name JOSEPH J MARSHALL, DBA JJ MARSHALL BUS CO LLC. Operates as Cecil County Public Schools bus contractor. USDOT registered since 6/1/1974 per third-party trucking database. Note: 'Marshall Bus Co.' in Cecil County contractor list (phone 410-658-3308) may actually point to Marshall Bus Company LLC USDOT 1072798 at 936 Ebenezer Church Rd, Rising Sun, MD (12 power units; MC-790116; James Marshall principal); however input address 27 Firetower Rd unambiguously matches JJ Marshall USDOT 7765. Inc date and SDAT entity status not directly retrieved in this run.

name: H & H Truck & Bus Co
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER record found for 'H & H Truck & Bus' at 4961 Ogden St, Detroit MI 48210 via SAFER keyword search (returned no results) or web search. The address may be obsolete or carrier may operate intrastate without a USDOT, may have ceased operations, or may use a different legal name. Multiple unrelated H&H carriers exist (H&H Sawdust at 3056 Hammond St Detroit 48210; HH Transport LLC USDOT 2827519 in Dearborn Heights; H&H Trucking LLC USDOT 3119986; H&H Transport Inc USDOT 3138322) but none match 4961 Ogden St. Michigan LARA business search system not directly accessible from this session.

name: Michigan Central Sch Bus LLC
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER record found for 'Michigan Central School Bus LLC' or variants ('Michigan Central Sch Bus', 'Michigan Central') via SAFER keyword search (all returned no results). Address 4324 13th St Wyandotte MI 48192 is near Trinity Transportation's 4624 13th St facility - possible affiliate/successor or a small standalone operator that operates intrastate without USDOT registration. Michigan LARA MiBusiness Registry not directly accessible in this session. Note: Illinois Central School Bus LLC (USDOT 1714924) exists but is a different state and operator.

name: T2's Bus Svc

name: Iguala Bus Co
notes: No current FMCSA/SAFER record found for 'IGUALA BUS' or 'IGUALA BUSMEX' via SAFER keyword search. Iguala Bus Co listed at 3321 McKinney St, Houston TX 77003, phone (713) 224-0883. Historically tied to Iguala Busmex Inc, which was placed out-of-service by FMCSA on Aug 9, 2008 as an 'imminent hazard' following the fatal Sherman TX motorcoach crash; FMCSA never granted operating authority. Current operating status uncertain - may be a separate or successor entity with no active USDOT. Texas Comptroller and SOS not directly verified in this run.
